hero.sub: Software Engineer · Machine Learning · AI Agents
hero.desc: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of machine learning and practical software engineering. Focused on medical AI, AI agents, and real-world applications.

about.heading:
Turning data
into decisions
paragraphs: I'm a computer science graduate specialising in AI and machine learning, with hands-on experience building production-ready systems that solve real problems.

My work spans medical image analysis, AI agents and RAG pipelines, robotics simulation, and web-integrated machine learning — with a focus on clean code, reproducible models, and interfaces people can actually use.
Completed my B.Tech (CGPA 8.73) at Siddarth Institute of Science and Technology, graduating in 2026.

projects.title: Hire-Me-Boss — ATS Resume Optimizer
projects.desc: A self-hosted, privacy-first ATS resume optimizer running entirely on local LLMs (Ollama-served Qwen2.5/Gemma2), parsing resumes and job postings and rewriting bullet points with zero data sent to third-party cloud services. Includes an ATS scoring engine, gap analysis, a side-by-side review dashboard, and export to formatted PDF/DOCX.

projects.title: Mom's Recipe Book
projects.desc: A social Android platform for sharing family recipes, featuring a Guided Cooking Mode with step-by-step instructions, per-step ingredient/flame-level display, built-in audio timers, Firebase authentication and cloud storage, and user profiles with recipe stats. Launched as v1.0.0 APK with Play Store launch in progress.

projects.title: Real-Time Human–Computer Interaction Using Computer Vision
projects.desc: The Gesture Control System is a real-time Human–Computer Interaction (HCI) application that allows users to control system-level operations using hand gestures captured via webcam. It combines MediaPipe, OpenCV, and Flask to provide live gesture recognition, backend processing, and a web-based dashboard.

projects.title: Autonomous Navigation Simulation
projects.desc: Simulated autonomous robot navigation using NVIDIA Isaac Sim (4.5.0) integrated with ROS2, working with synthetic data generation and physics-based simulation to prototype perception and path-planning workflows.

projects.title: HematoVision — Blood Cell Classification
projects.desc: Developed during an internship, this model classifies blood cell images into diagnostic categories using transfer learning, trained on 12,000+ annotated blood cell images. Aimed at improving efficiency for medical professionals in haematology workflows.

projects.title: Kidney Stone Detection Web App
projects.desc: A web application that detects kidney stones from medical images using a trained convolutional neural network. Integrated with a Flask backend and a clean, accessible frontend designed for clinical use.

points: Developed a project on Rising Water Flood Detection using machine learning techniques.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model training for accurate predictions.
Designed a system to analyze water level trends and detect potential flood risks early.
Worked with Python, NumPy, Pandas, and data visualization tools.
Enhanced skills in model evaluation, debugging, and optimization.
Collaborated in a guided learning environment with mentorship and periodic assessments.
experience.outcome: The Rising Water Flood Detection system enables early warning by analyzing environmental data, helping in disaster preparedness and risk management.

points: Completed a 2-month programme focused on applied machine learning.
Built and deployed ML models on real-world datasets.
Collaborated with a remote team on end-to-end project delivery.
Built Python applications across automation, data analysis, and visualisation.
Developed strong foundations in scripting, OOP, and library ecosystems.
